strengths: 18+ years of fullstack experience with deep TypeScript/Node.js and React work across multiple product companies
Direct AI agent development experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) at current role
Strong testing culture: TDD practitioner, author of testing libraries, ran testing workshops and Selenium courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned anywhere in the resume
Kotlin exposure absent and Java experience appears dated (2016-2018, non-web contexts)
Testing tooling listed does not explicitly include Vitest, Jest, or Playwright

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and modern JS test framework specifics

response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with nearly two decades spanning backend, frontend, mobile, and infrastructure, and hits the rarest requirement — hands-on AI agent and MCP tooling development — in his current staff-level role. Core stack alignment (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS) is strong, and his testing and craftsmanship background fits an internal tooling team well. Gaps are narrow and learnable: Nest.js is unmentioned but trivial for someone with his Node depth, and Kotlin/Java are secondary technologies where his exposure is stale but non-zero.
